description: Create visualization comparing zinc-binding catalytic residues between P. horikoshii AlaX (crystal structure) and human AARSD1
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import numpy as np

# Create a detailed catalytic residue comparison figure
fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(14, 6))

# Two protein sequences aligned at the zinc-binding motifs
# P. horikoshii AlaX (1WXO): H9-S-A-L-H13 ... C116-N-K-E-H120
# Human AARSD1 (Q9BTE6):     H109-S-G-Q-H113 ... C209-C-G-T-H213

# Draw as aligned blocks
y_ph = 3.5
y_aarsd1 = 1.5

# Header
ax.text(0.5, 5.5, 'Zinc-Binding Catalytic Residue Conservation', 
        ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', transform=ax.transData)

# Protein labels
ax.text(-0.5, y_ph, 'P. horikoshii AlaX\n(PDB 1WXO)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')
ax.text(-0.5, y_aarsd1, 'Human AARSD1\n(Q9BTE6, Isoform 1)', ha='right', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold')

# Color scheme for residues
def get_residue_color(aa, is_zinc=False):
    if is_zinc:
        return '#FFD700'  # Gold for zinc-binding
    elif aa in 'HCM':
        return '#FFB6C1'  # Pink for His/Cys
    elif aa in 'DE':
        return '#FF6B6B'  # Red for acidic
    elif aa in 'KR':
        return '#6B9BFF'  # Blue for basic
    elif aa in 'AILMFWVP':
        return '#B4D8B4'  # Green for hydrophobic
    else:
        return '#E0E0E0'  # Gray

# First zinc-binding motif (HxxxH)
motif1_ph = [('H', 9, True), ('S', 10, False), ('A', 11, False), ('L', 12, False), ('H', 13, True)]
motif1_aarsd1 = [('H', 109, True), ('S', 110, False), ('G', 111, False), ('Q', 112, False), ('H', 113, True)]

x_start1 = 1
for i, ((aa_ph, pos_ph, zn_ph), (aa_aa, pos_aa, zn_aa)) in enumerate(zip(motif1_ph, motif1_aarsd1)):
    x = x_start1 + i * 1.2
    
    # P. horikoshii
    color = get_residue_color(aa_ph, zn_ph)
    ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((x-0.4, y_ph-0.35), 0.8, 0.7, facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5 if zn_ph else 1))
    ax.text(x, y_ph, aa_ph, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(x, y_ph + 0.55, str(pos_ph), ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7, color='gray')
    
    # AARSD1
    color = get_residue_color(aa_aa, zn_aa)
    ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((x-0.4, y_aarsd1-0.35), 0.8, 0.7, facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5 if zn_aa else 1))
    ax.text(x, y_aarsd1, aa_aa, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(x, y_aarsd1 + 0.55, str(pos_aa), ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7, color='gray')
    
    # Conservation marker
    if aa_ph == aa_aa:
        ax.text(x, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, '|', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='green', fontweight='bold')
    elif zn_ph and zn_aa:
        ax.text(x, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, '|', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='green', fontweight='bold')
    else:
        ax.text(x, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, ':', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='gray')

# Gap indicator
x_gap = x_start1 + 5 * 1.2 + 0.5
ax.text(x_gap, y_ph, '···', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=16, color='gray')
ax.text(x_gap, y_aarsd1, '···', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=16, color='gray')
ax.text(x_gap, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, f'~100 aa', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=8, color='gray')

# Second zinc-binding motif (CxxxH)
motif2_ph = [('C', 116, True), ('N', 117, False), ('K', 118, False), ('E', 119, False), ('H', 120, True)]
motif2_aarsd1 = [('C', 209, True), ('C', 210, False), ('G', 211, False), ('T', 212, False), ('H', 213, True)]

x_start2 = x_gap + 1.5
for i, ((aa_ph, pos_ph, zn_ph), (aa_aa, pos_aa, zn_aa)) in enumerate(zip(motif2_ph, motif2_aarsd1)):
    x = x_start2 + i * 1.2
    
    # P. horikoshii
    color = get_residue_color(aa_ph, zn_ph)
    ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((x-0.4, y_ph-0.35), 0.8, 0.7, facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5 if zn_ph else 1))
    ax.text(x, y_ph, aa_ph, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(x, y_ph + 0.55, str(pos_ph), ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7, color='gray')
    
    # AARSD1
    color = get_residue_color(aa_aa, zn_aa)
    ax.add_patch(plt.Rectangle((x-0.4, y_aarsd1-0.35), 0.8, 0.7, facecolor=color, edgecolor='black', linewidth=1.5 if zn_aa else 1))
    ax.text(x, y_aarsd1, aa_aa, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=12, fontweight='bold')
    ax.text(x, y_aarsd1 + 0.55, str(pos_aa), ha='center', va='bottom', fontsize=7, color='gray')
    
    # Conservation
    if aa_ph == aa_aa:
        ax.text(x, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, '|', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='green', fontweight='bold')
    elif zn_ph and zn_aa:
        ax.text(x, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, '|', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='green', fontweight='bold')
    else:
        ax.text(x, (y_ph + y_aarsd1)/2, ':', ha='center', va='center', fontsize=14, color='gray')

# Labels for motifs
ax.text((x_start1 + x_start1 + 4*1.2)/2, 5.0, 'HxxxH motif\n(Zinc ligand 1)', 
        ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#2E86AB')
ax.text((x_start2 + x_start2 + 4*1.2)/2, 5.0, 'CxxxH motif\n(Zinc ligand 2)', 
        ha='center', va='center', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', color='#2E86AB')

# Zinc ion indicator
for x_mid in [(x_start1 + x_start1 + 4*1.2)/2 + 3.5]:
    pass  # Removed for clarity

# Legend box
legend_text = "Gold border = zinc-coordinating residue\nAll 4 zinc ligands (H, H, C, H) conserved ✓\nCrystal structure evidence: PDB 1WXO, 1WNU"
ax.text(14.5, 0.3, legend_text, fontsize=8, va='bottom', ha='right',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='lightyellow', edgecolor='gray', alpha=0.8))

ax.set_xlim(-3, 15)
ax.set_ylim(0, 5.8)
ax.set_frame_on(False)
ax.set_xticks([])
ax.set_yticks([])

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('aarsd1_catalytic_residues.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Catalytic residue comparison figure saved.")
